pages.text: $(o)"Up and down were never settled — gravity is just a habit."$()$(br2)From the Inversion School: a band of philosophers who believed sky and earth were merely a matter of perspective. For a moment, they were right.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Within $(l)18 blocks$(), all $(l)non-player$() entities are launched ~8 blocks upward and given Levitation II (3s).$(br2)On landing, they take fall damage scaled by altitude.$(br2)Cost: $(l)5200$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Crowd control + indirect fall damage + battlefield split.$(br2)Useless against flying mobs.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 4 Dominion$() or above.
